SEARCH
Package Algorithm

Interface VoronoiEngine

All Known Implementing Classes:
TriangulationDelaunay, VoronoiEngineStub
public interface VoronoiEngine
Interface defining the core operations of the Voronoi/Delaunay engine.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    Hospital
    addHospital(String name, double x, double y, int maxCapacity)
    Adds a hospital and recomputes the triangulation.
    User
    addUser(double x, double y)
    add an user
    VoronoiMap
    getMap()
    Returns the full map.
    Hospital
    getNearestHospital(double x, double y)
    Finds the nearest hospital to a given point.
    List<Triangle>
    getTriangles()
    Returns the current Delaunay triangles.
    List<HospitalZone>
    getZones()
    Returns the current Voronoi zones.
    void
    moveHospital(Hospital h, double x, double y)
    Moves a hospital to a new position and recomputes.
    void
    moveUser(User u, double newX, double newY)
    move an user
    void
    recompute()
    Recomputes the geometry.
    void
    removeHospital(Hospital h)
    Removes a hospital and recomputes the triangulation.
    void
    removeUser(User u)
    remove an user
    void
    updateViewport(double x1, double y1, double x2, double y2)
    Updates the visible area boundaries.

  • Method Details

    • addHospital

      Hospital addHospital(String name, double x, double y, int maxCapacity)
      Adds a hospital and recomputes the triangulation.
      Parameters:
      x - x-coordinate
      y - y-coordinate
      Returns:
      the created Site

    • removeHospital

      void removeHospital(Hospital h)
      Removes a hospital and recomputes the triangulation.
      Parameters:
      h - the hospital to remove

    • moveHospital

      void moveHospital(Hospital h, double x, double y)
      Moves a hospital to a new position and recomputes.
      Parameters:
      h - the hospital to move
      x - new x-coordinate
      y - new y-coordinate

    • getTriangles

      List<Triangle> getTriangles()
      Returns the current Delaunay triangles.
      Returns:
      list of triangles

    • getZones

      List<HospitalZone> getZones()
      Returns the current Voronoi zones.
      Returns:
      list of cells

    • getNearestHospital

      Hospital getNearestHospital(double x, double y)
      Finds the nearest hospital to a given point.
      Parameters:
      x - x-coordinate
      y - y-coordinate
      Returns:
      the nearest hospital

    • getMap

      VoronoiMap getMap()
      Returns the full map.
      Returns:
      the VoronoiMap

    • addUser

      User addUser(double x, double y)
      add an user
      Parameters:
      x -
      y -
      Returns:
      user

    • removeUser

      void removeUser(User u)
      remove an user
      Parameters:
      u -

    • moveUser

      void moveUser(User u, double newX, double newY)
      move an user
      Parameters:
      u -
      newX -
      newY -

    • updateViewport

      void updateViewport(double x1, double y1, double x2, double y2)
      Updates the visible area boundaries.
      Parameters:
      x1 - top-left x
      y1 - top-left y
      x2 - bottom-right x
      y2 - bottom-right y

    • recompute

      void recompute()
      Recomputes the geometry.
